title: Slow-cooker whole roast chicken
subtitle: A whole bird, cooked until the meat falls off the bone
excerpt: A whole chicken set on a bed of onion and carrot, slow-cooked for four to five hours until the meat is completely tender and falling from the bone. No crackling: the skin stays pale, but the flesh is exceptionally moist and the juices form an instant stock. Finish under the grill for colour if wanted.
sourceNotes: Cooking a whole chicken in the slow cooker is a method developed to address the main failure of oven-roasted chicken: dry breast meat. The slow cooker's wet heat environment keeps the breast from drying out over the cook time. The skin cannot crisp without dry heat, so the dish is finished under the grill for colour, or served as a pull-apart bird without any crust.

recipe.makeAheadNotes: Cook and cool. Pull all the meat from the carcass and refrigerate. Use within 2 days for sandwiches, salads, or pies.

content.text: Elevate the chicken above the base of the pot. The vegetables form a trivet that keeps the bird out of the accumulated liquid — if it sits in water it stews rather than roasts. The cooking juices that collect beneath the bird are an excellent light stock: strain and refrigerate for use in soups and risottos.

Scatter the {{onion}}, {{carrot}}, {{garlic}}, {{thyme-fresh}}, and {{bay-leaves}} across the base of the slow cooker. Mix the {{unsalted-butter}} with the {{sea-salt-fine}} and {{black-pepper}} and rub all over the {{chicken-whole}}, including under the breast skin where possible. Set the chicken on top of the vegetables, breast-side up. Cook on low for 4 to 5 hours, until the juices run clear when the thickest part of the thigh is pierced and the internal temperature reads 75°C. For a golden skin, place under a hot grill on a foil-lined tray for 5 minutes before resting. Rest for 10 minutes before carving.

items.symptom: Chicken not cooked through at 4 hours
items.cause: Bird was very cold or large, or cooker runs cool
items.fix: Check the internal temperature of the thigh. If below 75°C, cook for another 30 to 60 minutes. Always check temperature rather than relying on time alone

items.symptom: Skin pale and soft with no colour
items.cause: Slow cooker produces steam, not dry heat
items.fix: Finish under a hot grill for 5 minutes. The skin crisps quickly under direct heat. Watch closely — it can go from pale to burnt in 2 minutes

items.symptom: Breast meat dry despite the slow cooker
items.fix: Set a timer. Unlike leg meat, breast benefits from precision. Pull the chicken at 75°C internal temperature in the thigh and carve immediately after resting

content.text: A slow-cooker roast chicken is for households where the oven is occupied or where a simpler method is wanted. The result is more moist than oven-roasted but without any crust. Serve with roast vegetables cooked separately. Pull any leftover meat from the carcass and use for sandwiches or a quick chicken pasta the next day.
